title: Debt management report 2025-26
body: "This report sets out the remits for the Treasury’s agents, the Debt Management Office (DMO) and NS&I.  It outlines:   the government’s estimates for the amount of financing it needs to raise for the year ahead how the government will raise the financing and which instruments it will use   The report also sets out the DMO’s cash management remit. For more information on the government’s debt management activities visit the DMO and NS&I websites. "
